summary: Building an AI-driven predictive maintenance system for Metro Rail assets from fault-event and IoT sensor data.
details: Performing exploratory data analysis (EDA), data validation and visualization to surface patterns, trends and potential failure indicators in operational datasets.
Assisting in data preprocessing, cleaning and feature engineering to turn raw sensor and maintenance logs into ML-ready datasets.
Researching predictive maintenance methodologies and failure-prediction techniques for rail asset monitoring.
Collaborating with the team on data-driven solutions aimed at improving asset reliability, reducing unplanned breakdowns and optimizing maintenance planning.
